capability_request.question: Current gpt-5.6-sol standard API input, cached-input, and output prices with source

result_assessment.limitation: Returned catalog ended at GPT-4.1 and o4-mini and omitted gpt-5.6-sol.

decision_impact.decision: Do not invent or import a stale token rate. Keep hosted per-token cost unavailable, retain exact usage counts, and reduce the official hosted suite to a compact stratified set under the USD 10 cap.
